GM:(0,0,0)  M:(1,1,1)  N:(1/2,0,1/2)  NA:(0,-1/2,-1/2)  P:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  X:(1/2,-1/2,1)  XA:(-1/2,-1/2,-1)
GM:(0,0,0)  Y:(0,1,0)  V:(1/2,1/2,0)  L:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  U:(0,3/2,1/2)  M:(0,1,1/2)  A:(0,0,1/2)
GM1+  GM1-  GM2+GM2+  GM2-GM2-  GM3GM4  GM5GM6  (M)Y1+  (M)Y1-  (M)Y2+Y2+  (M)Y2-Y2-  (M)Y3Y4  (M)Y5Y6  (N)V1+  (N)V1-  (N)V3  (N)V2  (NA)L1+  (NA)L1-  (NA)L3  (NA)L2  (P)U1  (P)U2U2  (P)U3U4  (X)M1+  (X)M1-  (X)M2+  (X)M2-  (X)M3  (X)M4  (X)M5  (X)M6  (XA)A1+  (XA)A1-  (XA)A2+  (XA)A2-  (XA)A3  (XA)A4  (XA)A5  (XA)A6
